title: Kyrianow Survival V1
description: A small modpack to beautify your survival. Based on the private server "Kyrianow Survival".
body:
[![OTHER PROJECTS](https://img.shields.io/badge/DATAPACK%20ONLY-00af5c?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&labelColor=gray)](https://modrinth.com/user/Kyrianow) [![DISCORD](https://img.shields.io/badge/MORE%20HELP/BUG%20OR%20OTHERS-5865f2?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&labelColor=gray)](https://discord.gg/qabbadeptc) 

## Description

This modpack mainly contains client-side mods that are there to simplify and/or embellish the game but also some practical mod for creating video content like "FreeCam" and "ReplayMod".

The modpack will remain as up-to-date as possible over the Minecraft versions that will be released based on mod updates. If an unnecessary mod blocks the modpack update it will be removed to be updated and reset when it is updated.

Mod modification will be based on the private server "Kyrianow Survival".

## Mods obligatorily put
1. [BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3) (It adds personalization)
2. [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps), [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) and [Spark](https://modrinth.com/mod/spark) (To boost the performance)
3. [[EMF]](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) and [[ETF]](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) (For texture pack compatibility)
4. [Replay Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/replaymod) (For the practical side in video)
5. [Litematica](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica) (To be able to build in creative and reproduce more simply in survival)
6. [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) (Simply for the management of mods simply)
7. [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip) (For are rated more practical)
8. [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) (Allows you to easily see all the areas already visited)
